title: Runtime adapter
description: Target contract describing how the canonical .agents/ layer maps onto a specific LLM/coding-agent runtime. DEFINITION ONLY — no adapter is implemented in PR B. All adapters are 'planned' unless a documented active runtime exists (only .vscode/.codex/ is currently active, for the Codex runtime).

id.description: Runtime id. Core-targets (ADR): codex, claude-code, kimi, ollama, gemini. Kandidat: cursor. Sekundær: qwen-code (registry secondary_models). Future candidates (visual/design/research host-runtimes) may extend this enum later — not implemented.

status.description: Only the Codex runtime backing .vscode/.codex/ is 'active' today. All others are 'planned'/'not-implemented'. Cursor is a planned adapter candidate sourced from docs/agents/sources/runtimes/cursor.md.

entrypoint.description: Instruction file the runtime reads, e.g. AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, or an Ollama Modelfile SYSTEM block.

target_paths.description: Generated output locations for this runtime (e.g. .vscode/.codex/ for codex, .claude/ for claude-code).

prompt_rendering.description: How canonical prompts are rendered for this runtime.

skill_loading.description: How skills are exposed (e.g. symlink, copy, absolute-path load).

registry_rendering.description: How the canonical registry is rendered/validated for this runtime.

memory_behavior.description: How Brain/memory is provided to this runtime.

$comment: Planned adapter set: codex (active, .vscode/.codex/), claude/claude-code (CLAUDE.md + .claude/), kimi, ollama (Modelfiles), gemini (GEMINI.md), cursor (from source-library). Future candidates: design/visual/research host-runtimes (claude-design.md, visualize.md, research_instructions.md) — reference only, not implemented. Adapter implementation is PR C; runtime generation is PR D/F.
